input_text: Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. John is a sparrow. The cat slept on the velvet sofa. Mike is a bird. The letter was written in June. Cities in Estonia are estonian. The cake was eaten by the child. Muggles cannot disappear. The book was read by Sara. Sue is a true patriot. Mary's uncle arrived. Sandra travelled to the office. Elephants are big. The animal lifted the stone. If X is cool and nice then X is red. The teacher showed the students the map. Anna handed Mark a key. Who has an uncle?

(3) If some X has some uncle Y then X is an answer  [from steps 1, 2]
(5) If some X has Mary's uncle then X is an answer  [from steps 3, 4]
